text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> <TITLE>klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch avelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Sub. scriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> à <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neü fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, <BIBL>des Herrn Abbts <AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem frantzösischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":2,"explanation":"Two structural XML fixes were made: (1) The first closing </TITLE> after 'Land-Leben' had no matching opening tag — the text 'klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter...' was a second title segment, so an opening <TITLE> tag was added before it. (2) The second book entry ('des Herrn Abbts Fleury Kirchen-Historien...') was missing its enclosing <BIBL>...</BIBL> tags, which were added to match the pattern of the other entries. Additionally, garbled character encodings (e.g. '\\u221a\\u00ba', '\\u221a\\u2202') were restored to their intended German characters (ü, ö, ß, à) for readability."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> <TITLE>klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch avelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Sub. scriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> à <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neü fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, <BIBL>des Herrn Abbts <AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem frantzösischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Two structural XML fixes were made: (1) The first closing </TITLE> after 'Land-Leben' had no matching opening tag — the text 'klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter...' was a second title segment, so an opening <TITLE> tag was added before it. (2) The second book entry ('des Herrn Abbts Fleury Kirchen-Historien...') was missing its enclosing <BIBL>...</BIBL> tags, which were added to match the pattern of the other entries. Additionally, garbled character encodings (e.g. '\u221a\u00ba', '\u221a\u2202') were restored to their intended German characters (ü, ö, ß, à) for readability.
